subject: Fwd: sikorsky
body:
Got a message from Reenstra today that Sikorsky agreed to our $11,650,000  
price.  Made George have Sikorsky send me the offer directly. Sikorsky  offer 
came today at $11,640,000.  Larry is comparing the old and new  contracts to 
make sure they are identical.  Cursory review of the contract  shows that we got 
training for 3 pilots and 3 mechanics and a warranty of three  years or 1,000 
miles.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

From: "Whittaker, Raymond V      SIK" <RWhittaker@SIKORSKY.COM>
Subject: RE: sikorsky
Date: Tue, 30 Oct 2007 18:46:15 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Cc: "Germon, Howard H          SIK" <hgermon@SIKORSKY.COM>, "George Reenstra" <g.reenstra@yourjet.com>

Darren
 
It has been a while and I hope that this note finds you well. Please see
the attached revision to the contract that we has sent to you on or
about October 5th. The pricing reflects the changes discussed via
George. Sikorsky is pleased to be able to assist Air Ghislaine with its
rotary wing requirements and considers Air Ghislaine a valued customer.
I respectfully request that Air Ghislaine receive the attached offer as
Sikorsky's Best and Final Offer for the transaction in question. 
 
Please feel free to contact me at you convenience if you have any
questions or have any issues with this transmission. 
 
Best Regards
Ray 
 
 
 

Ray Whittaker
Manager, S-76 Business Operations
Business Operations/Commercial Marketing
Sikorsky Aircraft Corporation
(203) 386-4417 (voice)
(860) 998-7434 (fax)
RWHITTAKER@SIKORSKY.COM
